prestazioni: Engine swap to a **6VD1 3.2L V6** (from the Isuzu Trooper) with forged internals: Manley forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft. Pair with a **Garrett GT3582R turbo** (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** for 18 psi of boost, targeting 350-400 whp on E85. Use a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with a **Plex Knock Monitor** for real-time ignition timing adjustments.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: **Isuzu-specific Quaife ATB differential** (part #QDF7J) for the rear axle, paired with **GKN CV joints** and a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** (organic/ceramic hybrid) for the **MUA5 5-speed manual transmission**. Upgrade the transfer case (if 4WD) with **Advance Adapters heavy-duty output shaft** and **ARB Air Locker** for front axle traction.

Suspension overhaul: **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valved for the Rodeo’s **UBS55 chassis**), paired with **Whiteline adjustable sway bars** (24mm front, 22mm rear) and **Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings** (full set, part #4.5104G). Install **SPC adjustable camber plates** (front) and **Megan Racing toe arms** (rear) for alignment precision. Brake system: **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers** (355mm rotors front) with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Widebody Kit** (modified for the Rodeo’s **UBS55 platform**), including custom carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Use **Seibon Carbon** for the hood (with functional vents) and **VIS Racing** carbon fiber side skirts. Paint: **PPG Vibrance Collection ‘Lime Squeeze’** with a **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap** on the roof and pillars.

Wheel setup: **Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2** (18x9.5 +15 front, 18x10.5 +25 rear) with **Toyo R888R tires** (255/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Use **H&R Trak+ wheel spacers** (15mm front, 25mm rear) for flush fitment. **Custom stainless steel bolt-on fender flares** (from **KBD Body Kits**) to accommodate the widebody and wheel setup.

Interior: **Recaro SPG XL seats** (with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**) mounted on **Bride seat rails**. Replace the stock steering wheel with a **NRG Innovations 350mm deep-dish wheel** (with **Isuzu logo embroidery**) and a **Sparco quick-release hub**. Install a **Defi BF Advance gauge cluster** (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR) in a **custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod**. Full sound deadening with **Dynamat Xtreme** and **custom Alcantara headliner** (color-matched to the exterior).
